title: Savory Brazilian Crumble
description: A delicious and savory Brazilian-inspired crumble dish, perfect for snacking or as a side.

ingredients.name: Savory
ingredients.notes: Available in most supermarkets or online.

ingredients.name: Brazilian
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, drained and chopped.

ingredients.name: Crumble
ingredients.notes: Store-bought or homemade, crumbled into small pieces.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine savory, Brazilian, and chopped onion.
In a separate bowl, mix crumble with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Transfer the savory mixture to a baking dish and top with crumble mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
